question: Which object in the image is made of metal? Select from the following options: (A) The statue necklace. (B) The person in the center. (C) The pendant with the buddha. (D) The flower on the glass pedestal.
gold_answer: The flower on the glass pedestal
answer_choices: The flower on the glass pedestal
